description: Fiscal register (possibly equivalent to what al-Makhzūmī and Ibn Mammātī call a rūznāmaj). Contains multiple entries, each with a date and a sum. Each entry has a pair of ʿalāʾim on top, suggesting a process of registration and certification akin to that on the fiscal receipts themselves. The procedure implied here is remarkably congruous with al-Makhzūmī’s claim that the mushārif and ʿāmil signed off not only on the receipts, but on the makhzūma of the jahbadh. (Information from Marina Rustow)
description_he: פנקס פיסקלי (ייתכן 'רוזנאמג' כמוגדר אצל אל-מח'זומי ואבן ממאתי); מספר רשומות כל אחת עם תאריך וסכום; כל רשומה עם זוג עלאמות המציין אישור ורישום
